items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Public Hearing and Discussion of the Local Control Accountability Plan (LCAP) for 2024-2025 and the Annual Update for the 2023-2024 LCAP
Public Hearing for the RCSD 2024-25 Proposed Budget
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the June 5 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the Board Meeting Dates Calendar for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of Disbursement of Measure U Funds for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Casa Circulo Cultural for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between Redwood City School District and Effective School Solutions, LLC (ESS) Program for Mental Health Services for the 2024-25 School Year
Approval of the MOU between Sequoia Healthcare District and Redwood City School District for the 2024-25 School Year
Approval of Agreement for Service Between Effective School Solutions, LLC and The Redwood City School District for the 2024-2025 School Year
Ratification of Warrant Registers, May 1, 2024 - May 31, 2024
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 7 (Approval of Disbursement of Measure U Funds) was moved to action item 7.4. Trustee stated: 'I want to move um measure U dispersement to action item it'll be number 7.4'
